name: Beef Roast with Mushroom Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 x 4 oz Mushrooms, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the mushrooms: Drain and chop 4 oz of mushroom pieces.
2. Season the flank steak with salt and pepper. Spread one side with mustard.
3. To prepare the stuffing: Heat vegetable oil in a frying pan, add onion and cook for 3 minutes until lightly browned. Add mushroom pieces; cook for 5 minutes. Stir in parsley, chives, tomato paste, and bread crumbs. Season with salt, pepper, and paprika.
4. Spread the stuffing on the mustard side of the flank steak, roll it up jelly-roll fashion, and tie securely with thread or string.
5. To prepare the gravy: Cook bacon in a Dutch oven until partially done. Add the meat roll and brown all sides for approximately 10 minutes. Add onions and sauté for 5 minutes. Pour in the beef broth, cover the Dutch oven, and simmer for 1 hour.
6. Remove the meat to a preheated platter. Season the pan juices with mustard. Salt and pepper to taste; stir in tomato catsup. Serve the gravy separately.
